race.comment: Open race. SWIFT CIRCLE (6) can run well at early each way odds having run a strong race for second coming back to this grade at Bendigo last time out. Prior to that he'd run a close up sixth in better company and if the tempo is on he'll be charging late. IMPONDERABLE (11) has placed in her past couple, just missing in easier at Seymour before a solid third at Mornington. She'll roll forward and have map favours. OMNIC (13) is the other key speed influence who is racing well without winning, stuck on 1 from 20 but placing in his past couple. He'll be up there again and gets a handy 2kg claim for Jabez Johnstone. LOTS OF TIME (9) is a progressive mare who won narrowly at Sale second up and is well placed to go on with it to 1600m.
